reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 엄청 바스락거려서 멍머가 너무 좋아해요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It crinkles so much and my pup absolutely loves it haha

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 쿠키 강추합니다~👍 간삭 작게 서너개 넣어놓으면 30분 넘게 노즈워크 신나게합니다~!!!더 많이 구매할껄 후회중입니다~🤭
reviews.content_en: I highly recommend the cookie! 👍 If I put just a few small treats in it, my dog does nose work for over 30 minutes~!!! I'm regretting not buying more~🤭

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
노즈워크는 무조건 바잇ㅁ ㅣ🫶
간단하게 간식 하나 넣어서 시키기 좋네요. 너무 큰 노즈워크 장난감은 난이도가 있어서 오래하긴 하지만 간식을 많이 넣어야해서 불편했거든요. 이런 소소한 노즈워크 너무 좋습니당!! 저희애는 푸들인데 머리가 쪼끔 나빠서 이것도 버벅거려요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: For nose work, it's gotta be BITE ME 🫶 It's perfect for doing nose work with just one treat in it. Those really big nose work toys can be challenging and keep them busy for a while, but they're inconvenient because you have to put in so many treats. I love these simple nose work toys so much!! My pup is a poodle and since she's not the brightest lol, she fumbles around with it haha

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요! 입구가 생각보다 작아서 3개월 푸숑에게도 조금 난이도 있는 토이예요! 처음에는 조금 어려워 하더니, 입구 찾는 방법을 배운 후 잘 찾아서 먹어요. 20분 동안 갖고 놀았어요 :)
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! The opening is smaller than I expected, so it's actually a bit challenging even for my 3-month-old Poodle mix! At first she struggled a bit, but after learning how to find the opening, she does well finding and eating the treats. She played with it for about 20 minutes :)

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
생긴것도 너무 귀엽구 간식넣어주니 난리났네요 ㅋㅋ
한참 붙잡고 집중하고 열심히 파서?먹어요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It looks so adorable and when I put treats in it, she goes crazy lol She grabs onto it and concentrates hard, digging and eating lol

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 집에 노즈워크 장난감 많은데 간단하게 넣어서 줄 수 있을 것 같아서 구매한 건 부가적인 이유고 너무 깜찍해서 구매했어요ㅜㅜ 바스락소리 진짜 크게 잘나고 저희엄마도 보시더니 동전지갑으로 탐낼만큼 귀엽습니다ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 모든 노즈워크 3분컷인 천재강아지인데 깊숙히 넣어놓으니 삼십분은 헤맵니다ㅜㅜ너무 좋아요 그런데 역시나 한번 가지고 놀면 침범벅이 되어 빨아놨습니다 두개니까 번갈아서 하기 좋네요ꉂꉂ(ᵔᗜᵔ*)짱이에요
reviews.content_en: I have lots of nose work toys at home, and while I bought it thinking I could easily use it to hide treats, the real reason was because it's just so darn cute lol The crinkle sound is really loud and nice, and when my mom saw it, she loved it so much she wanted it as a coin purse hahahaha My dog is a genius that usually finishes all nose work in 3 minutes, but when I stuff the treats deep inside, she searches for 30 minutes hehe I love it so much! And as expected, once she plays with it, it gets all covered in drool so I wash it. Since there are two, it's great to alternate between them ꉂꉂ(ᵔᗜᵔ*) It's the best!

reviews.name: 봄****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 장난감이지만 노즈워크 할 용도로 산게아니고 저희집 강아지가 나이들어가면서부터 턱힘이 약해진건지.. 단단하거나 두껍고 무거운 장난감을 잘 못가지고 놀길래 일부러 가벼울거같은 납작한 이 초코쿠키 장난감을 산건데 생각했던거보다 개꿀템이에요....!!!평소에 출근할때나 외출할때 종이컵 한 5~8개에 간식 쪼끄만거 넣어서 노즈워크 만들어주고 나가는데 청소하기 빡셌거든요? 근데 속는셈치고 방금 쿠키장난감 두개에다가 간식 넣어서 던져주고나왔는데 왠걸...?? 지금 출근길에 홈씨씨티비로 훔쳐보는데 완전 잘갖고놀고있어요ㅠㅠㅜ 열심히 저 말고 쿠키에서 간식찾고 있습니당...앞으로는 퇴근하고 종이컵 안치워도 되겠네요 ㅠㅜㅋㅋㅋ감동..노즈워크로 쓸생각없었는데 와우내... 외출시 넘편해져써용 ㅋㅋㅋ 종이컵은 애가 이제 통달해서 너무 금방 쉽게 뜯기도하고 뒷정리하기도 귀찮았는데 잘산거같아요 ㅋㅋ출근준비시간 단축개꿀ㅋㅋ저희집 애도 잘갖고노니까 성공적쇼핑이라 기분도 좋으네용 이런장난감으로 몇개 더 사야겠어요 사랑해요 바잇미...♡
reviews.content_en: It's labeled as a nose work toy, but I didn't buy it for that purpose. As my dog has gotten older, her jaw strength has weakened, so she struggles with hard, thick, and heavy toys. I specifically bought this flat chocolate cookie toy because I thought it would be light, and honestly it's such a treasure... Usually when I leave for work or go out, I make nose work by putting small treats in about 5-8 paper cups, but cleanup was such a hassle you know? But I thought why not, so I just threw in two cookie toys with treats before heading out, and guess what?? I'm sneaking peeks on my home security camera on my way to work and she's playing with it so well ㅠㅠㅜ She's working hard finding the treats in the cookies instead of me... I won't have to deal with paper cups when I get home now ㅠㅜㅋㅋㅋ I'm moved... I didn't plan to use it for nose work but wow me... it's so convenient for going out ㅋㅋㅋ The paper cups were a problem because she's mastered those now and tears them apart so easily, plus cleanup was annoying, so I think I made a good purchase ㅋㅋ It cuts down my morning routine so much ㅋㅋ Since my pup plays with it well too, it's a successful purchase and I'm in a good mood 😊 I should buy a few more of these toys. I love you BITE ME...♡

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워용 ㅎ 바잇미 장난감들이 젤 튼튼하고 이뻐서 신상은 무조건 구매합니다~
reviews.content_en: It's so cute ㅎ BITE ME toys are the most durable and pretty so I always buy their new releases~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
아직 아가라 간식을 못 먹어서 손가락 넣고 바스락바스락 소리내면서 놀아주는데, 너무 귀여워요 
조금 더 크면 노즈워크 해주면 더 잘 가지고 놀거 같아요
2개라 번갈아가면서 사용해도 될거같아요
reviews.content_en: She's still too young to eat the treats, so I play with her by putting my finger in and making crinkle sounds, and it's so cute! Once she gets a bit bigger, I think she'll play with it even better when doing nose work. Since there are 2, I think I can alternate using them too

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 빼먹은 흔적이 엄청나요 ㅋㅋ 진짜 여기에 사료 넣어주면 너무 잘 먹어요^^
reviews.content_en: The traces of treats being pulled out are crazy lol If I put kibble in here, she eats so well^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 파괴왕이라서 바스락 장난감만 사주는데 이 제품 궁금해서 사봤어요! 생각보다 작았고, 울아이가 장난감을 다 찢고 뒤집는 습관이 있는데 장난감 뒷면에 좀 안좋아보이는 재질이 보이네요… 다른 바잇미 바스락장난감에서는 보지 못했던 스펀지같은 재질이에요 :(
reviews.content_en: My pup is a total destroyer, so I usually just buy crinkle toys for him! I was curious about this product so I picked it up. It's smaller than I expected, and my dog has this habit of shredding toys and flipping them over. I noticed some questionable-looking material on the back of the toy... It's like a spongy material I've never seen on other BITE ME crinkle toys before :(

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바스락바스락 소리를 너무 좋아하네요~^^
막 던지고 놀기도하구요~
그 안에 북어트릿 넣어주면 환장하면서 먹으면서 놀아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: He loves the crinkly crinkly sound so much~^^ He just throws it around and plays with it~ If I put a dried pollack treat inside, he goes crazy and plays while eating it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 봄****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 장난감이지만 노즈워크 할 용도로 산게아니고 저희집 강아지가 나이들어가면서부터 턱힘이 약해진건지.. 단단하거나 두껍고 무거운 장난감을 잘 못가지고 놀길래 일부러 가벼울거같은 납작한 이 초코쿠키 장난감을 산건데 생각했던거보다 개꿀템이에요....!!!평소에 출근할때나 외출할때 종이컵 한 5~8개에 간식 쪼끄만거 넣어서 노즈워크 만들어주고 나가는데 청소하기 빡셌거든요? 근데 속는셈치고 방금 쿠키장난감 두개에다가 간식 넣어서 던져주고나왔는데 왠걸...?? 지금 출근길에 홈씨씨티비로 훔쳐보는데 완전 잘갖고놀고있어요ㅠㅠㅜ 열심히 저 말고 쿠키에서 간식찾고 있습니당...앞으로는 퇴근하고 종이컵 안치워도 되겠네요 ㅠㅜㅋㅋㅋ감동..노즈워크로 쓸생각없었는데 와우내... 외출시 넘편해져써용 ㅋㅋㅋ 종이컵은 애가 이제 통달해서 너무 금방 쉽게 뜯기도하고 뒷정리하기도 귀찮았는데 잘산거같아요 ㅋㅋ출근준비시간 단축개꿀ㅋㅋ저희집 애도 잘갖고노니까 성공적쇼핑이라 기분도 좋으네용 이런장난감으로 몇개 더 사야겠어요 사랑해요 바잇미...♡
reviews.content_en: It's technically a nose work toy, but I didn't buy it for that purpose. As my dog has gotten older, his jaw strength has weakened, so he doesn't play well with hard, thick, or heavy toys. That's why I deliberately bought this flat chocolate cookie toy because I thought it would be light. But it's way better than I expected....!!! Usually when I leave for work or go out, I make a DIY nose work game by putting small treats in about 5-8 paper cups, but that's such a pain to clean up, right? So I just threw two of these cookie toys with treats inside and left, and guess what...?? I'm checking the home security camera on my way to work and he's playing with it SO well ㅠㅠㅜ He's working hard to find the treats in the cookie instead of me... I won't have to put away paper cups when I get home anymore ㅠㅜㅋㅋㅋ So moved.. I didn't plan to use it for nose work but wow... it's so convenient for going out ㅋㅋㅋ My pup figured out the paper cup trick so easily and it was annoying to clean up anyway, but I think I made a great purchase ㅋㅋ Saves so much time on getting ready for work ㅋㅋ Since my dog loves playing with it, it's a successful shopping trip and I'm in such a good mood 용 I need to buy a few more of these toys! I love you BITE ME...♡

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content:
저희집 마루는 번식장에서 태어나 애견카페를 거쳐서 저에게까지 힘들게 왔어요 큰 소리와 삑삑이소리에 트라우마가 있어서 엉덩이를 벌벌 떨고 하루종일 소리가 어디서 나는지 찾고는 하는데 매번 장난감들은 삑삑이가 들어있거나 삑삑이와 바스락이 같이 있어서 사서 주면 쓰레기통에 넣어지곤 했어요 
근데 이번에 사준 바잇미 바스락 쿠키 장난감은 삑삑이도 없고 노즈워크 할수 있게끔 공간이 있어서 잘 가지고 놀더라구요 ㅠㅜ 처음으로 장난감을 가지고 놀길래 기뻣어요
앞으로도 삑삑이 없는 바스락 장난감은 바잇미에서 사야겠다 생각했어요 ! 많이 만들어주세요 감사합니다 ♡̷̷∘°
reviews.content_en: My Maru was born at a breeding facility, went through a dog cafe, and had a hard journey getting to me. He has trauma from loud noises and squeaky sounds—he trembles and spends all day trying to figure out where the sound is coming from. Every toy I've bought him either had a squeaker inside or both a squeaker and crinkle, so he just throws them in the trash. But this BITE ME crinkle cookie toy doesn't have a squeaker and has spaces for nose work, so he actually played with it well ㅠㅜ I was so happy because it was the first time he played with a toy. From now on, I'll only buy crinkle toys without squeakers from BITE ME! Please make more of them. Thank you ♡̷̷∘°

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 생각보다 빼먹기 힘들고같아 좋아요. 기존애들 익숙해지니 넘 긍방 먹드라구요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's harder to pull the treats out than I thought, which is great. Once my other dogs got used to it, they started eating them really well ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 장난감들이 다 특성이 있고 개성넘쳐서 좋아요. 저희 강아지가 너무 좋아하고 잘 물어뜯고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: I love that each toy has its own unique characteristics and personality. My dog loves them so much and enjoys chewing and playing with them.

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 1년 조금 넘은 비숑 견주 입니다!! 호기심도 너무 많구 이것저것 물고 노는 것을 좋아하여 인형이나 공 같은 장난감을 진짜 너무너무너무 좋아해요 ㅠㅠ 엄청 사주구 사줘도 좀만 지나구 보면 다 뜯겨있구 어쩔때 보면 막 뜯어먹혀 있더라구요,, ㅠㅠㅠ ㅎ,,그래서 아무래도 먹기까지 하게 되면 안전한 놀이감이 중요한대 찾아보다 생긴것도 귀여운데 안전성 실용성까지!!! 좋은 제품만 모아놓은것 같은 바잇미를 알게 됐어요! ㅎㅎ 덕분에 매일 재미있게 놀면서 무럭무럭 자라나는 중입니다!! ㅇ감사해요 앞으로도 더 안전하고 좋은 제품들 부탁 드려요~~🥰❤️
reviews.content_en: I'm a Bichon owner with just over a year of experience!! He's so curious and loves chewing and playing with everything, so he's absolutely obsessed with plush toys and balls ㅠㅠ I keep buying them, but after just a bit of time they're all shredded and sometimes I find him actually eating pieces ㅠㅠㅠ ㅎ,, So if he actually eats things, safe toys are really important. While searching, I discovered BITE ME—the toys look cute AND have great safety and practicality!!! It seems like they've collected only good products! ㅎㅎ Thanks to them, my pup plays happily every day and is growing up healthy!! Thank you, and please keep making safe and quality products in the future~~🥰❤️

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 10kg  중형견에게는 입구가 좀 작기는한데 ㄱㄷ래도 열심히 찾아먹네요
reviews.content_en: The opening is a bit small for a medium-sized dog weighing 10kg, but he still searches hard to eat the treats

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 왜 한세트만 샀을까 아쉬울 정도로 잘가지고 놀아요! 노즈워크하는데 주머니가 생각보다 깊어서 발로 잡고 하는데 얼마나 귀여운지 ㅎㅎ 다하고 나면 저렇게 되있더라구요 저희 애기 열정 보이시나요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I wish I'd bought more than one set! He plays with it so well! The pockets are deeper than expected for nose work, and he holds it with his paws—it's so cute ㅎㅎ When he finishes, he looks like this. Can you see my baby's enthusiasm? ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 주머니가 깊어서 깊숙히 트릿이나 사료를 넣을 수 있어서 좋아요 ~!! 쉽게 빼지 않고 시간이 좀 걸리는 걸 좋아해서 만족합니다. 바스락거리는 소리부분도 커서 아이가 계속 흥미있어 하는것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: The pockets are deep so you can hide treats or kibble deep inside, which is great ~!! I'm satisfied because he doesn't pull them out easily and it takes some time. The crinkly sound part is also loud, so my pup seems to stay interested in it.

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 해주려고 구매했어요
리뷰도좋고 막상받아보니 넘귀엽네요
아가들이 잼나게놀았으면 좋겠네요
바잇미에서 이것저것샀는데 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I bought this for nose work activities. The reviews were great, and when I got it, it's so cute! I hope my pups have fun playing with it. I've bought several things from BITE ME and they're all good.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바스락거려서 좋아해요
노즈워크는 깊어서 별 의미는 없는것같아여ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I like the crinkly sound 📦 but the nose work part is too deep, so it doesn't seem very effective 😢

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
진작 살걸 그랬나봐요~
노즈워크는 처음인데 두부가 너무 잘 가지고 놀고 간식도 잘 찾고 신이났네요.
처음해보는거라 제일 쉬운 버전의 노즈워크 장난감을 구매했어요. 다행히 잘 하는걸보니 다음엔 책모양의 노즈워크 장난감을 사서 놀게 해줘야겠어요.
reviews.content_en: I wish I'd bought this sooner! This is my first nose work toy, and Tofu absolutely loves playing with it and finding the treats—she's having a blast. Since it's our first time, I got the easiest version of the nose work toy. She's doing so well with it that next time I should get her the book-shaped nose work toy to play with.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 두개 들어있고 너무 귀여워요ㅜㅜ안에 간식을 깊게 숨길 수 있어서 좋아용~
reviews.content_en: It comes with two and they're so cute 😭 I love that you can hide treats deep inside!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 디자인이 너무 귀여워요♡ 강아지도 노즈워크 좋아하네요♡♡♡
reviews.content_en: The design is so adorable ♡ My pup loves nose work too ♡♡♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미 양말 노즈워크가 숙달된 기술로 
식은죽 먹기가 될무렵.. 
쿠키를 만나면서 뜨거운 죽으로 변함
난이도 어려움 그래서 간식탐험 오랜시간 하게됨
reviews.content_en: Once Tofu mastered the BITE ME sock nose work toy, it became like eating cold porridge... but then she met the Cookie toy and it turned back into hot porridge! High difficulty level, so she spends a long time exploring for treats.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이거 진작 구입할걸...
바스락 바스락 거리는 소리와 간식 넣는 곳이 깊어서 노즈워크 고수에게 딱~인 장난감이예요
깊이 넣어 주면 그래도 조금이나마 찾는 시간이 지체되네요 하하^^;;
그래도 금방 끝내버리고 또 뚫어져라 쳐다봄
reviews.content_en: Wish I'd bought this sooner... The crinkly sound and deep treat pocket make this the perfect toy for nose work experts! When I hide treats deep inside, it does slow her down a little bit. But she still finishes it quickly and just stares at it waiting for more 😄

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
바스락 거리는 소리에 환장하네요 ㅋㅋ
근데 간식 넣어줘도 못빼먹었어요ㅜㅜ
너무 깊이 넣어준건지,,,,,,,,
입구쪽에 해줘야 빼먹고 좀 안으로 넣으면 먹기 어려운가봐요. 
인형은 다 뜯어놔서 못사주는데 이건 안그래서 좋아요!!
reviews.content_en: She's obsessed with the crinkly sound 😂 But even when I put treats in, she can't seem to get them out 😢 I think I was putting them too deep... You have to put them near the opening, or if you push them too far in, it becomes too difficult for her. I can't give her other plush toys since she tears them apart, but this one's great because she doesn't do that!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
귀여운데 셋팅하기도 편해서 만족도 최고입니다❤️
생각보다 더 바스락거려서 주의끌기도 좋고
집중해서 잘 가지고 노는 것 보면 너무 뿌듯해요❣️
reviews.content_en: It's cute and so easy to set up—I'm super satisfied ❤️ It crinkles more than I expected, which is great for getting her attention, and seeing her focus and play with it is so rewarding ❣️

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 다른장난감도 잘 놀지만 초코크키기 젤 최애;; 이거주면 다른거 다 버리고 와요!! 진짜 짱귀 이제 초코쿠키는 간식넣어주면 금방빼먹긴하는데 간식 안넣어줘도 엄청 좋아해요! 바스락최고..👍 버스탈때도 조용합니다...체고..!!
reviews.content_en: She plays well with other toys, but Cookie is her absolute favorite 😍 Give her this and she drops everything else to come get it!! She's seriously the cutest! She does finish treats fast when I put them in, but she loves it just as much without treats too! Crinkly sounds are the best 👍 She's even quiet with it when we're on the bus... perfection!! 😆

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지 주둥이에 비해 입구가 작아서 애를 먹네요
쉽게 먹으면 재미 없으니 잘 산 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: The opening is a bit small for our pup's snout, so it's tricky to use 😅 But since it's not too easy, I think we made a good purchase!

reviews.name: w****
reviews.content:
클로이 최애 장난감은 이 쿠키인 거 같아염 ㅎㅎ
장난감에 흥미가 별로 없었는데 바스락+노즈워킹 장난감을 젤 조아하더라구용
reviews.content_en: Chloe's favorite toy seems to be this cookie! 😄 She wasn't really interested in toys before, but she absolutely loves this crinkly nose work toy the most

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 간식 안넣어줘도 잘 가지고 놀아요 ㅎㅎ 바스락 소리나서 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: She plays with it well even without treats inside 😄 She loves the crinkly sound!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 주머니가 깊어서 애들이 쉽게 못 빼먹고 하루종일 씨름하고 있어요~~ 넘 좋아요~~ 다른건 바로 빼먹어서 노즈워크 의미가 없었는데 요건 오랫동안 코박고 있어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 귀엽게 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The nose work pockets are so deep that the pups can't easily pull the treats out—they've been wrestling with it all day long~~ So good~~ Other toys get emptied right away so nose work doesn't mean much, but with this one she's got her snout in it for ages haha so cute 😄😄

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 무서워해서 바스락만 있는거 삿는데 잘가지고 놀아요! 노즈워크오 최고!!
reviews.content_en: Our pup is scared of squeaky toys, so we got just the crinkly version and she plays with it great! Nose work is the best!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 저희집 강아지는 장난감 사주면 물어뜯고 먹어서 며칠 못가는데 이 장난감은 안에 솜이 없어서 안전하게 놀 수 있어서 좋아툐요! 지금 최애장난감 됐어요 ◡̈
reviews.content_en: My dog usually destroys toys and eats them, so they only last a few days, but this one has no stuffing inside so it's safe to play with—that's awesome! It's become her favorite toy now ◡̈

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바스락소리에 진짜 좋아하는 삑삑이 인형들 다 저리가라 입니다.. 혼자 바스락거리면서 쿠키욤욤하면서 잘 놀아요ㅋㅋㅋ 두개라서 던지고 놀기에도 딱 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: Our pup LOVES the crinkly sound—all those squeaky toys can take a backseat now... She plays so well with it, crunching on the cookie while making crinkle sounds all by herself haha Two of them are perfect for tossing around too^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바스락 소리가 커서 아이가 엄청 좋아하겠어요~
포장 패키지도 이뻐서 바잇미는 선물용으로 찜바구니요^^
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sound is pretty loud, so your pup is gonna absolutely love it~ The packaging is also so cute that BITE ME is definitely going on my gift wishlist^^

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
벌써 몇 개 째 사는 건지 모르겠어요 ;)
애들 촤애 장난감!
reviews.content_en: I've lost count of how many I've bought at this point ;) The kids' absolute favorite toy!

reviews.name: 헌****
reviews.content: 노즈워크장난감 여러가지 구매했는대 다 잘가지고 놀고 외출할떄도 슬링백에 몇개 넣어서 가지고 나가면 유용하더라구요 넘 잘 쓰고 있습니다!!
reviews.content_en: I bought several different nose work toys and they all play with them well, and it's super handy to throw a few in my sling bag when we go out! We're loving it so much!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바스락거려서 흥미유발 짱이에요!! 계속 물고 다녀요 ㅋㅌ
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sound is amazing for getting her interested!! She keeps chewing on it lol

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 생각보다 장난감들이 탄탄하고 퀄리티가 좋아요 강쥐가 신나서 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! The toys are sturdier and better quality than I expected. My pup is having a blast playing with it

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 간식 꺼내먹는게 생각보다 쉽지 않네요~ 외출할때 간식 넣어놓고 가면 유용할 것 같아요. 그리고 쿠키는 엄청 젖었습니다...ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's harder to get the treats out than I thought~ It seems like it would be really useful to stuff with treats before heading out. And the cookie got really wet... lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워크하기 딱 좋아요~ 솜안들어있어서 안심이고 바스락 소리로 흥미끌기도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Perfect for nose work~ I like that there's no stuffing inside so it's safe, and the crinkly sound is great for grabbing their attention

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content:
바스락소리가 자극적인지 좋아해요~
간식을 넣어주니 아주 열심히 꺼내먹네요
reviews.content_en: She loves the crinkly sound~ When I put treats inside, she works really hard to dig them out

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 바스락바스락 소리나서 엄청 좋아해요 안에 사료 넣어줬는데 그건 잘 못빼먹네요ㅠ 계속하다보면 나중엔 빼먹을 수 있겠죠
reviews.content_en: Love the crinkly crinkly sound! I put kibble inside but he has trouble getting it out ㅠ But if he keeps at it, he'll probably figure it out eventually

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요! 안에 간식 넣어주니 잘 빼먹네용
reviews.content_en: My pup plays with it well! When I put treats inside, she gets them out nicely

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 디자인이 맘에 들고 강아지기 잘 써요
reviews.content_en: I like the design and my pup uses it well

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 장난감으로 잘가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: She plays with it nicely as a nose work toy

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리에 아가들이 엄청 신나하고 노즈워크 할 수 있어서 너무 좋아요 주머니가 꽤 깊어요
reviews.content_en: The pups go crazy for the crinkly sound and it's so great because they can do nose work with it too! The pockets are pretty deep
